input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.8.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.8.2.2
            TITLE: if any deflection is significant, then a force of approximately 200 n may be applied.

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.8.2.2: If any deflection is significant, then a force of approximately 200 N may be applied.
IN.8.2.2 If any deflection is significant, then a force of approximately 200 N may be applied. 
a. Loaded deflection should not be more than 25 mm 
b. Any permanent deflection less than 5 mm

final_answer: If any deflection is significant, then a force of approximately 200 N may be applied. IN.8.2.2 If any deflection is significant, then a force of approximately 200 N may be applied. a. Loaded deflection should not be more than 25 mm b. Any permanent deflection less than 5 mm
